mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM warehouse WHERE wid IN
#{wid}
mapper.update: UPDATE warehouse SET name = #{name}, type = #{type}, sub_type = #{subType}, is_delete = #{isDelete}, country_code = #{countryCode}, wp_id = #{wpId}, wp_name = #{wpName}, t_warehouse_name = #{tWarehouseName}, t_warehouse_code = #{tWarehouseCode}, t_country_area_name = #{tCountryAreaName}, t_status = #{tStatus} WHERE wid = #{wid}
